ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, NOT(ISCHANGED( AbacusDebtor__c )), ISBLANK(UID__c), ISPICKVAL(LocationCountry__c ,"Switzerland"), OR( ISPICKVAL(LegalNature__c,"Corporation / Limited Company"), ISPICKVAL(LegalNature__c,"Limited Partnership") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter the correct UID for this Legal Entity. You can retrieve it by searching www.zefix.ch. (ACM013)
